SEARCH
Package com.dropbox.core.v2.team

Class SharingAllowlistAddError

java.lang.Object
com.dropbox.core.v2.team.SharingAllowlistAddError
public final class SharingAllowlistAddError extends Object
This class is an open tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isAbc() methods will return true. You can use tag() to determine the tag associated with this instance.

Open unions may be extended in the future with additional tags. If a new tag is introduced that this SDK does not recognized, the OTHER value will be used.

      Unknown error.

    • OTHER

      public static final SharingAllowlistAddError OTHER
      Catch-all used for unknown tag values returned by the Dropbox servers.

      Receiving a catch-all value typically indicates this SDK version is not up to date. Consider updating your SDK version to handle the new tags.

  • Method Details

    • tag

      public SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag tag()
      Returns the tag for this instance.

      This class is a tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isXyz() methods will return true. Callers are recommended to use the tag value in a switch statement to properly handle the different values for this SharingAllowlistAddError.

      If a tag returned by the server is unrecognized by this SDK, the SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag.OTHER value will be used.

      Returns:
      the tag for this instance.

    • isMalformedEntry

      public boolean isMalformedEntry()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag.MALFORMED_ENTRY, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag.MALFORMED_ENTRY, false otherwise.

    • malformedEntry

      public static SharingAllowlistAddError malformedEntry(String value)
      Returns an instance of SharingAllowlistAddError that has its tag set to SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag.MALFORMED_ENTRY.

      One of provided values is not valid.

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of SharingAllowlistAddError with its tag set to SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag.MALFORMED_ENTRY.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getMalformedEntryValue

      public String getMalformedEntryValue()
      One of provided values is not valid.

      This instance must be tagged as SharingAllowlistAddError.Tag.MALFORMED_ENTRY.

      Returns:
      The String value associated with this instance if isMalformedEntry() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isMalformedEntry() is false.
